title: koanophyllon polyodon
side_effects: Koanophyllon polyodon can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as headaches and dizziness due to its potential to interact with certain medications. In severe cases, prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to liver damage and kidney problems. Some individuals may also experience allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and respiratory issues, after exposure to the plant's volatile oils. Additionally, koanophyllon polyodon can exacerbate pre-existing medical conditions, including high blood pressure and diabetes.
